text.tspan: Log entries appended to linked list'|

ol.li: Strict Ordering: Log entries must reach the journal device before the JE_COMMIT block is issued.
Atomic Durable Write: The TXN_COMMITTING state represents a blocking I/O barrier.
Recovery Semantics: Upon reboot, the recovery agent scans for JE_COMMIT. If found, it forces the transition from COMMITTED to APPLIED.

text.tspan: Action: Calc CRC32, append to list
